name: Megan West
subject: INTERVIEW: Concerned about your public schools?
body:
| | Peter, Have you ever wondered why teachers unions have so much power? Rebecca Friedrichs was a public school teacher in California for 28 years, and throughout her entire career, she was forced to fund unions that would take her money and spend it on far left causes she didn’t agree with or stand for. She learned the unions were pushing a social and sexual agenda into our schools by using her money. So, she decided to do something about it. Rebecca became the lead plaintiff in a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court. name: Dan Baer
subject: I need your help before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Mitch McConnell just said that he will single handedly block any legislation proposed by a Democratic president.
|
---

| | I need your help: [**Will you help me hit 1,000 signatures on my petition demanding Mitch McConnell take up House-passed bills on universal background checks and LGBTQ+ protections? >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8267a/232dfd1/9905011/62a11a52/3099676923/VEsH/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-election-petition?source=20190706_em_pet_b1_baer_all") I want you to stand with me to call this out. Mitch McConnell just said that he will single handedly block any legislation proposed by a Democratic president. No bills will see the light of day. No votes will take place on his Senate floor. He's already doing this right now by refusing to put House-passed bills like The Equality Act or The Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2019 up for a vote in the Senate. Our chance at restoring progress and leadership to this country will be dead on arrival... all because of Mitch McConnell. I refuse to accept that. And I need you to fight back with me. [**If we hit 1,000 new signatures before midnight on my petition demanding that Mitch McConnell bring these bills up for a vote, I 'll personally deliver your signatures to him. Can I count on you to sign your name alongside mine? >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8267a/232dfd1/9905011/62a11a52/3099676923/VEsE/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-election-petition?source=20190706_em_pet_b1_baer_all") Your support of this campaign to win Colorado and flip the Senate is proof that we all care about what's at stake. I hope I can count on your signature now. Thanks, Dan
